Short CV

Ceren Saran holds her PhD from Galatasaray University, Media and Communication Studies, with her thesis titled “Informational Capitalism, Data and Journalism: The Use of Digital User Data on News Websites in Turkey”. She completed her MA at Galatasaray University and her BA in Journalism from Istanbul University. Her research interests are the political economy of media and communication, critical digital media and platform studies, digital media and society, algorithms and journalism studies. She worked as a visiting lecturer at Uskudar University and İstinye University, correspondent for various alternative media organizations, and as a research assistant.
